𝗬𝗢𝗣𝗔𝗦𝗦 | Securely sharing sensitive information like passwords and secrets through a one-time, expiring link, accessible via a web interface or CLI.  📈 Growing!

⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬

𝗧𝗘𝗖𝗛 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗖𝗞: 📘 TypeScript 
🎯 𝗨𝗦𝗘 𝗖𝗔𝗦𝗘: Securely sharing sensitive information like passwords and secrets through a one-time, expiring link, accessible via a web interface or CLI.
📅 Created: Jan 2014 • Updated: Mar 2026

⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬

✨ 𝗞𝗘𝗬 𝗙𝗘𝗔𝗧𝗨𝗥𝗘𝗦 ✨

✅ End-to-End encryption using OpenPGP
✅ Secrets can only be viewed once
✅ No accounts or user management required
✅ Secrets self destruct after X hours
✅ Custom password option
✅ Limited file upload functionality
✅ Command-line interface


⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬

📊 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗧𝗦

⭐⭐⭐⭐ 2.6K 𝘀𝘁𝗮𝗿𝘀
🍴 389 𝗳𝗼𝗿𝗸𝘀
🔍 6 𝗼𝗽𝗲𝗻 𝗶𝘀𝘀𝘂𝗲𝘀

⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬

📝 𝗔𝗕𝗢𝗨𝗧 𝗧𝗛𝗜𝗦 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧

Yopass is a tool for securely sharing secrets, passwords, and files. It utilizes end-to-end encryption in the browser, ensuring that the decryption key is never sent to the server. Secrets are one-time viewable and self-destruct after a set period, minimizing sensitive information exposure in insecure channels.

⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬

𝗙𝗙𝗠𝗣𝗘𝗚-𝗢𝗩𝗘𝗥-𝗜𝗣 | Enabling media servers (like Jellyfin or Emby) or other applications to utilize powerful remote GPU transcoding resources without complex infrastructure changes.  🔥 Super Hot!

◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦

𝗧𝗘𝗖𝗛 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗖𝗞: 🐹 Go 
🎯 𝗨𝗦𝗘 𝗖𝗔𝗦𝗘: Enabling media servers (like Jellyfin or Emby) or other applications to utilize powerful remote GPU transcoding resources without complex infrastructure changes.
📅 Created: Feb 2024 • Updated: Mar 2026

◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦

✨ 𝗞𝗘𝗬 𝗙𝗘𝗔𝗧𝗨𝗥𝗘𝗦 ✨

✅ GPU-accelerated FFmpeg transcoding from anywhere
✅ No GPU passthrough or shared filesystems required
✅ Client/server architecture over a single TCP port
✅ Pre-built FFmpeg/ffprobe binaries with broad hardware acceleration support (NVENC, QSV, VAAPI, etc.)
✅ HMAC-SHA256 authentication for commands
✅ Real-time stdout/stderr forwarding
✅ Support for multiple clients connecting to a single server
✅ Cross-platform support (Linux, macOS, Windows)


◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦

📊 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗧𝗦

⭐⭐⭐ 863 𝘀𝘁𝗮𝗿𝘀
🍴 21 𝗳𝗼𝗿𝗸𝘀
🔍 3 𝗼𝗽𝗲𝗻 𝗶𝘀𝘀𝘂𝗲𝘀

◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦

📝 𝗔𝗕𝗢𝗨𝗧 𝗧𝗛𝗜𝗦 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧

ffmpeg-over-ip is a Go-based solution that allows applications to leverage GPU-accelerated FFmpeg transcoding on remote servers without requiring direct GPU access, complex setups like PCIe passthrough, or shared filesystems. It acts as a proxy, forwarding FFmpeg commands and file I/O over a TCP connection to a server running a patched FFmpeg instance.

◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦

🔗 𝗟𝗜𝗡𝗞𝗦
• 𝗚𝗶𝘁𝗛𝘂𝗯: https://github.com/steelbrain/ffmpeg-over-ip

𝗡𝗔𝗩𝗜 | To provide an interactive and discoverable way for users to find and execute command-line commands, especially complex ones, by offering dynamic suggestions and a searchable cheatsheet interface.  🔥 Super Hot!

🎯 𝗨𝗦𝗘 𝗖𝗔𝗦𝗘: To provide an interactive and discoverable way for users to find and execute command-line commands, especially complex ones, by offering dynamic suggestions and a searchable cheatsheet interface.

✅ Interactive command execution
✅ Dynamic argument suggestions
✅ Customizable cheatsheet management
✅ Integration with fzf and skim
✅ Shell and Tmux widget support
✅ Alias and shell scripting capabilities

📝 𝗔𝗕𝗢𝗨𝗧 𝗧𝗛𝗜𝗦 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧

Navi is an interactive cheatsheet tool for the command-line that helps users discover and execute commands. It integrates with fuzzy finders like fzf or skim to provide dynamic suggestions for command arguments, reducing the need to memorize complex CLI syntax.

𝗟𝗔𝗠𝗔-𝗟𝗢𝗖𝗔 | An AI-powered personal study assistant that processes user-provided documents to generate various academic outputs and answer questions, all while operating completely offline.  ✨ Notable!

🎯 𝗨𝗦𝗘 𝗖𝗔𝗦𝗘: An AI-powered personal study assistant that processes user-provided documents to generate various academic outputs and answer questions, all while operating completely offline.
📅 Created: Mar 2026 • Updated: Mar 2026

✅ Chat with your books for real-time answers
✅ Generate academic reports (DOCX, MD)
✅ Create PowerPoint presentations (PPTX)
✅ Produce structured study notes
✅ Write academic essays
✅ Perform critical analysis of topics
✅ Prepare for exams with definitions and Q&A
✅ Fully offline operation

Lama Loca is an offline AI study assistant that learns from your personal documents (PDF, EPUB, DOCX, etc.) to generate reports, presentations, summaries, and answer questions. It processes your data locally, ensuring privacy and security.

𝗜𝗫𝗘𝗥𝗔𝗠 | Debugging and reverse engineering applications on Linux directly from the terminal, especially for performance-critical tasks or remote SSH environments.  

⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬

🎯 𝗨𝗦𝗘 𝗖𝗔𝗦𝗘: Debugging and reverse engineering applications on Linux directly from the terminal, especially for performance-critical tasks or remote SSH environments.
📅 Created: Feb 2026 • Updated: Mar 2026

⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬

✨ 𝗞𝗘𝗬 𝗙𝗘𝗔𝗧𝗨𝗥𝗘𝗦 ✨

✅ Advanced Memory Scanner (Int8/16/32/64, Float, Double, Strings, AOB, wildcards, multi-threaded, real-time tracking)
✅ Static Pointer Discovery
✅ Interactive Disassembler (x86-64, syntax highlighting, jump-to-address)
✅ Live Patching (Keystone Engine)
✅ Structure Dissector
✅ Call Graph Analysis
✅ Memory Freezing
✅ Data Export (JSON, Ghidra Python scripts)
✅ Integrated Speedhack (LD_PRELOAD)
✅ Zero Dependencies (Self-Contained Static Builds)

IxeRam is a high-performance, terminal-native memory scanner and debugger for Linux, offering a "Cheat Engine-like" experience. It focuses on speed, low overhead, and integration with tools like Ghidra, utilizing advanced techniques for direct memory access and live patching.

𝗚𝗘𝗢-𝗔𝗜-𝗪𝗢𝗢 | To make WordPress and WooCommerce websites discoverable and understandable by AI search engines and LLMs through automated generation of SEO-optimized content and configuration files.  🔥 Super Hot!

✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿

🎯 𝗨𝗦𝗘 𝗖𝗔𝗦𝗘: To make WordPress and WooCommerce websites discoverable and understandable by AI search engines and LLMs through automated generation of SEO-optimized content and configuration files.
📅 Created: Mar 2026 • Updated: Mar 2026

✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿

✨ 𝗞𝗘𝗬 𝗙𝗘𝗔𝗧𝗨𝗥𝗘𝗦 ✨

✅ Generates `/llms.txt` and `/llms.full.txt` for AI crawler visibility
✅ Adds AI-specific metadata (AI Description, AI Keywords, Exclude from AI)
✅ Supports a wide range of AI bots including GPTBot, ClaudeBot, Gemini, PerplexityBot, and more
✅ WooCommerce-first focus with zero-configuration setup
✅ Integrates with the broader GEO AI ecosystem for multi-platform AI search optimization
✅ Provides fallback mechanisms for filesystem write issues

GEO AI Woo is a WordPress plugin designed to optimize websites, particularly WooCommerce stores, for AI search engines and Large Language Models (LLMs). It automatically generates essential files like `llms.txt` and `llms-full.txt`, along with AI-specific metadata and crawler rules, to enhance content visibility and structure for AI crawlers.
